rows.cycle_goal_summary: From empty inventory in a fresh flat fixture world, collect actor-owned wood, craft and place a crafting_table, craft and equip a wooden_pickaxe, then create a visible starter worksite marker or low wall using at least six actor-collected wood/plank/log blocks. Primary success requires runtime evidence for wooden_pickaxe plus visible placed-block structure progress; partial milestones are logs, planks, sticks, crafting_table item, placed crafting_table, wooden_pickaxe, equipped tool, and six placed structure blocks.
